title: Schneider Electric Lisse Screwless Deco 2G 13A Sw SO SP w/ 2USB BSB, USB, Satin Brass, 2 Gangs
features: Future proofed to cater for latest demands in technology
7mm raised edge plate with rounded profile
Ideally suited for new construction and refurbishment projects requiring a smooth modern plate profile
Removable screwless cover with a reliable clip-in system
Gently rounded metal rocker to compliment the curved profile
Light grey back moulding for easier terminal identification
Cable markings to check wire length
description: From the manufacturer Reliable and durable design: With quality components, including the front plate which is made from high quality stainless steel, these robust switches are built to withstand the test of time. Lisse Deco range is a durable yet stylish choice for at home, corporate offices and hotels. A masterpiece for your walls Introducing the finest new addition for your home and office – Lisse Screwless Deco From commercial properties to your private home, Lisse Screwless Deco boasts of an extensive range of products for every kind of space. Our range of electrical accessories include switches, socket outlets, and LED dimmers that fit seamlessly into your homes. Combined USB sockets and flexible multimedia options offer delightful convenience in hotel rooms. And other products like shaver sockets, data, media, audio, and USB outlets, grid systems, and will suit your every need and requirement. Ideally suited for new construction and refurbishment projects Future-proofed to cater for the latest demands in consumer technology Painting and Decorating made easy by the unique Screwless design and clipping system Cleverly designed to ensure that product ordering is simple and efficient, with many time and space saving solutions Crafted with your customer in mind, adding bespoke solutions to make a lasting impact Stylish design, simple installation With backed out and upward facing captive terminal screws as well as a discreet clip-on mechanism, the Lisse Deco range enables quick and easy installation, making it an ideal time-saving solution. Available in different colour variants Choose your favourite colour: Stainless Steel, white insert Stainless Steel, black insert Satin Brass, black insert Mocha Bronze, black insert Polished Chrome, white Insert Light Copper, white insert Various switches and sockets Different models including: USB sockets 1 and 2 gang sockets Lockable sockets Plate switches Dimmers Special features Lisse Deco accessories include: Integrated key hooks Clip-on extensions Phone charging shelves With a range that's both stylish and practical, the choice is yours USB sockets 2 gang sockets Plate switches Dimmer Dimmer 2G 2way Fused connection unit Add To Basket Buying Options Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 378 — 4.6 out of 5 stars 1,348 3.7 out of 5 stars 26 4.1 out of 5 stars 76 4.6 out of 5 stars 59 Price £38.16 £ 38 . 16 — no data £13.60 £ 13 . 60 £31.99 £ 31 . 99 £22.95 £ 22 . 95 £8.32 £ 8 . 32 Model number GGBL30202USBAWSSS GGBL3020WSSS GGBL1012WSSS GGBL6012LSSS GGBL6022CSSS GGBL5010BSBS Product Lisse USB sockets Lisse 2 gang sockets Lisse Plate switches Lisse Dimmers Dimmer 2G 2way Switched Fcu-13A Color Stainless Steel/White Stainless Steel/White Stainless Steel/White Stainless Steel/White Stainless Steel/White Satin Brass/Black Available sizes 1 or 2 gang 1 or 2 gang 1 to 3 plate swiches 1 to 3 dimmers 1 to 3 dimmers 1 gang Dimensions 14.8 x 8.7 x 3.3 cm 20.0 x 11.0 x 8.7 cm 2.4 x 8.7 x 8.7 cm 8.7 x 8.7 x 4.5 cm 8.7 x 8.7 x 4.5 cm 9.2 x 8.7 x 9.2 cm Included 2G 13A Sw SO SP w/ 2USBWSS, instruction leaflet, fixings 2G 13A Sw Socket WSS, instruction leaflet, fixings 10AX 1G 2W Switch WSS, instruction leaflet, fixings Uni Dimmer 1G 2way 400W/VA SB, instruction leaflet, fixings - no data - no data Profile plate size 7 mm 7 mm 7 mm 7 mm 7 mm 7 mm
